creator: rrogalski@firemail.cc
text:
On this FreeBSD machine, wpa_supplicant.conf needs `key_mgmt=NONE` added to unsecured network entries to connect. pc-netmanager seems to always use wpa_supplicant to connect to any open network on this machine. 

I would be willing to write and attach a .patch fixing this, but I noticed the upstream repo has been archived for a long hot minute.. do you guys on FreeBSD carry .patch's in the ports tree? Or would you perhaps be willing to fork upstream?

I'm not really a FreeBSD user or know much about it, excuse my ignorance here. Also how networking is handled here confuses the bajeezles out of me... ( I miss linux's networkmanager :[ )

--
Rich
